recommendedActions: Dispatch night-patrol inspection team to record specific pole numbers and identify faulty circuit breakers or blown transformers on the ORR service road stretch
Perform immediate physical verification of ground-level junction boxes for potential cable theft or water ingress damage
Replace damaged LED luminaires or faulty photocell sensors to ensure automatic night-time activation
Coordinate with on-site contractors to execute emergency repairs on underground power lines if a localized fault is confirmed
dependencies: BBMP Electrical Division for administrative clearance and site access
Bengaluru Traffic Police for safety cordoning and traffic management during repair works on the busy service road
BWSSB for verifying if any recent excavation work caused accidental damage to underground power cables
